steps.name: source-body-connector-selection-and-policy-gate
steps.summary: ESB1 added scripts/external_source_connector_body_selection.py, tests/test_external_source_connector_body_selection.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-esb1-source-body-connector-selection.md. It selects interpretive_accounting_material as the first connector lane, keeps live fetching/chunking/embedding blocked, and limits public reports to metadata/policy/schema/status fields.

steps.name: synthetic-source-body-fixture-contract
steps.summary: ESB2 added scripts/external_source_connector_body_fixture_contract.py, tests/test_external_source_connector_body_fixture_contract.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-esb2-source-body-fixture-contract.md. It defines a synthetic interpretive source fixture schema, parser output schema, chunk output schema, and public-safety boundary that blocks copied payloads while preserving locator/policy/retrieval metadata.

steps.name: chunking-and-retrieval-dry-run
steps.summary: ESB3 added scripts/external_source_connector_body_retrieval_dry_run.py, tests/test_external_source_connector_body_retrieval_dry_run.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-esb3-chunking-retrieval-dry-run.md. It creates three synthetic chunks from the ESB2 fixture contract and ranks two dry-run retrieval queries using labels/metadata only, with copied payload rendering blocked.

steps.name: connector-leak-and-policy-gate
steps.summary: ESB4 added scripts/external_source_connector_body_leak_policy_gate.py, tests/test_external_source_connector_body_leak_policy_gate.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-esb4-connector-leak-policy-gate.md. It scans ESB1~ESB3 public reports for blocked markers, verifies synthetic negative cases only, and reports marker counts without rendering blocked marker contents.

steps.name: horizon-close-and-workflow-coverage-handoff
steps.summary: ESB5 added scripts/external_source_connector_body_close_gate.py, tests/test_external_source_connector_body_close_gate.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-external-source-body-connector-expansion-close-report.md. The horizon closes as connector_body_lane_ready and hands off to workflow-coverage-depth-expansion.
